akk: KIŠIB ma-nu-ba-lúm-a-šur DUMU ṣí-lá-{d}IM KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur KIŠIB MAN-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a
eng: Seal of Mannum-balum-Aššur son of Ṣilli-Adad, seal of Šu-Illil son of Mannum-kī-Aššur, seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SIG₅ i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-ta-a a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ì-lí-dan ITU.KAM ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um e-na-sú-in a-na ITU 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Puzur-Aššur son of Ataya owes 22 shekels of good silver to Ali-ahum. Reckoned from the week of Ilī-dan, month of Ša-kēnātim, in the eponymy of Enna-Suen, he will pay in 14 weeks. If he has not paid in time, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB ṣí-lu-lu DUMU ú-ku
eng: Seal of Šu-Illil son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṣilūlu son of Uku.

akk: i-nu-mì i-dí-a-bu-um a-wa-sú iq-bi-ú 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na ša-lim-a-šùr i-dí-in um-ma šu-ut-ma i-ṣí-ba-at KÙ-pì-a li-il₅-qé
eng: When Iddin-abum spoke his will, he gave 10 minas ofדsilver to Šalim-Aššur. He said: He may take it from the interest on my silver.""

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB a-li-li KIŠIB a-bi₄-lá KIŠIB lá-qé-ep
eng: Seal of Ali-ahum, seal of Ali-ilī, seal of Abila, seal of Lā-qēp,

akk: ša i-na ba-áb-tim ša a-šùr-be-el-ma-al-ki-im ša iš-ti DUMU a-tù-ri-a ù a-mur-a-šùr ḫi-na-a iṣ-bu-tù-ma a-na e-lá-ma ip-qí-du 2 ma-na 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am e-lá-ma a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ù a-li-li ip-qí-du KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ḫi-im a-li-li ù ḫi-na-a a ba-re-šu-nu i-lá-ak
eng: that what hinnāya had seized as part of an outstanding claim of Aššur-bēl-malkim from Atūriya's son andfrom Amur-Aššur and had entrusted to Elamma - an amount of 2 minas 13.5 shekels of refined silver, which Elamma in turn had entrusted to Ali-ahum and Ali-ilī - that this silver will become the joint property / responsibility of Ali-ahum, Ali-ilī and hinnāya.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí
eng: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu, seal of Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ša ili₅-ba-ni DUMU a-mur-a-šur ù a-ḫu-qar DUMU šu-IŠTAR GÍR ša a-šùr iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a-šùr-i-mì-tí DUMU a-mur-lu-ṣú ù a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šùr-e-mu-qí pí-šu-nu iš-me-ú-ni <gap>-ni <gap> a-šur <gap> ṭup-pu <gap> a-bi-ni
eng: For these proceedings concerning Ilī-bāni son of Amur-Aššur and Ahu-waqar son of Šu-Ištar - they seized Aššur's dagger and Aššur-imittī son of Amur-luṣu and Abu-šalim son of Aššur-emūqī heard their statement. <gap>

akk: a-na a-ḫa-tim
eng: To Ahātum;

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im ù KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: seal of Ali-ahum and seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU e-lá-lí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU en-na-sú-in KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU šál-mì-ḫi-im KIŠIB pu-šu-ki-in DUMU sú-e-a
eng: Seal of Ali-ahum son of Elāli, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Enna-Suen, seal of Dan-Aššur son of Šalim-ahum, seal of Pūšu-kēn son of Sueyya.

akk: šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur i-tí-dí-in i-na 1 GÚ 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ṭup-pì-šu ḫa-ar-mì-im ša en-nam-a-šur 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-lá-qé-ma 3 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tí um-me-a-ni-šu šu-mì pu-šu-ki-in i-lá-pá-at šu-ma a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku qá-sú im-ta-ḫa-aṣ <gap>-20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma 10 ma-na KÙ.GI iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-dí-a-šur ù i-ku-nim a-na 46 ḫa-am-ša-tim pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-da-an-ma na-ru-uq en-nam-a-šur a-li ṭá-bu-šu-ni pu-šu-ki-in ú-šé-ra-áb šu-ma pu-šu-ki-in na-ru-qám a-na en-nam-a-šur lá i-tí-dí-in 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am pu-šu-ki-in a-na en-nam-a-šur i-ša-qal šu-ma en-nam-a-šur qá-tám im-ta-ḫa-aṣ 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na pu-šu-ki-in i-ša-qal ta-aḫ-sí-is-tum a-ni-tum me-ḫi-ir ṭup-pì-im ḫa-ar-mì-im ša ku-nu-uk pu
eng: If Aššur-taklāku has given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur, then he will receive 2 minas of silver out of the 1 talent 2 minas of silver in his certified tablet, belonging to Ennam-Aššur, and he will write down 3 minas of gold in the name of Pūšu-kēn with his other investors. If Aššur-taklāku has refused him, then Pūšu-kēn will give 40? minas of silver, representing 10 minas of gold, within 46 weeks reckoned from the week of Iddin-Aššur and Ikūnum, and Pūšu-kēn will make Ennam-Aššur's joint-stock investment enter wherever it is favourable for him. If Pūšu-kēn has not given a joint-stock investment to Ennam-Aššur (in time), Pūšu-kēn must give 10 minas of refined silver to Ennam-Aššur. If Ennam-Aššur has refused, he must pay 10 minas of refined silver to Pūšu-kēn. This memorandum is a copy of a certified tablet sealed by Pūšu-kēn.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-i-mì-tí DUMU du-dí-ki KIŠIB ú-ṣur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-ku-a KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Aššur-imittī son of Dudiki, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Akuwa, seal of Aššur-bāni,

akk: kà-al-bi₄-im 15 ma-na URUDU ší-kam a-na šu-mì en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ta-áp-ḫi-ri-im áš-qúl
eng: the dog". I paid 15 minas of -copper to the temple-funds on behalf of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur."

akk: KIŠIB ba-zi-a
eng: Seal of Baziya,

akk: šu-ḫu-bur ù ku-ul-ma-ku-ul-ma na-áš-pé-er-tí ma-ma-ḫi-ir ša 3 ma-na KÙ ú-šé-ru-šu-nu-tí-ni
eng: Šu-hubur and Kulma-kulma; Missive from Man-mahir stating that I released 3 minas of silver to them.

akk: a-na ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im ḫa-nu-nu DUMU en-um-a-šur ú-ṣur-ša-a-šùr DUMU PÚZUR-a-šur ú a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU a-šur-na-da
eng: To Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, Hanunu, son of Ennum-Assur, Usur-sa-Assur, son of Puzur-Assur and Assur-lamassi, son of Assur-nada,

akk: KIŠIB pì-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-na-da
eng: seal of Pilah-Istar son of Assur-nada.

akk: KIŠIB pí-la-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU i-bi₄-sú-a KIŠIB šu-ma-li-bi₄-a-šur DUMU ku-ús-ku-sí-im KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU
eng: Seal of Pilah-Ištar, son of Ibisua, seal of Šumma-libbi-Aššur, son of Kuskusum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Šamaš,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-na-sú-in ù a-al-DU₁₀ me-er-e a-mur-{d}UTU 3.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-šùr-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 1 ma-na-im 2 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is ITU.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša i qá-té sú-kà-lí-a il-qé-ú
eng: (to the effect) that the debtof Ennam-Suen andĀl-ṭāb, sons of Amur-Šamaš, is 3.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver. From the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar they will add per 1 mina2 shekels per month as interest.For the silver they are jointly liable. Month II,eponymy of the one who took over from Sukkalliya.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU šu-bé-lim KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a
eng: Seal of Ennānum son of Šu-Bēlum, seal of Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya.

akk: 13.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na ṣé-er ú-ṣú-ur-ša-a-šur DUMU a-mur-i-a i-ri-šum i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš₁₀-tim ša a-šur-i-mì-tí ù a-mur-IŠTAR 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Uṣur-ša-Aššur son of Amurriya owes 13.5 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. Reckoned from the week of Aššur-imittī and Amur-Ištar he must add interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-bé-lim DUMU ku-zi-zi-a
eng: Seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Kuziziya;

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU a-dí-la-at DUMU a-ta-a a-ḫi a-ta a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pí-im i-ḫi-id-ma iš-tí a-zu-ú tí-ir-ta-kà le-zi-ba-am
eng: to Ali-ahum son of Adad-ellat, (grand)son of Ataya. My dear brother, pay heed to the words of the letter and let your message be left with Azu.

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-ra-bi KIŠIB na-bi-sú-in DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU šu-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Amur-Šamaš son of Miššu-rabi, seal of Nabi-Suen son of Illil-bāni, seal of Ikūn-pī-Aššur son of Šu-Ištar.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the

akk: kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš ṣa-ḫe-er GAL dí-nam i-di-in-ma <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR be-ú-lá-at zi-ki-im a-na a-šùr-i-dí ir-ma-a-šùr i-ša-qal
eng: Kanesh colony in plenary session. The Kanesh colony in plenary session passed the following verdict: <gap> mina of silver, the working capital of Zikum to Aššur-idī Ir'am-Aššur shall pay.""

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-im ša a-šùr wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ṭup-pá-am a-dí-in
eng: Tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'um of Aššur. The Šamuha station gave me, and I gave the tablet.

akk: KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB a-šur-ba-ni DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Uraya son of Manana, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im
eng: To Ali-ahum;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-ša-ra-sà
eng: seal of Amur-šarrassa.

akk: <gap>
KIŠIB DINGIR.SIPA DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB šu-lá-ba-an DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-bé-eḫ DUMU {d}a-šur-{d}UTU-ši
eng: Seal of Ilī-rē'ī, son of Ataya, seal of Šu-Labān, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Puzur-Abeh, son of Aššur-šamšī,

akk: ša šu-iš-ḫa-ra DUMU <gap>-a ù PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ 9 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ḫa-bu-ra-ta-i-am ša-bu-ra-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša {d}UTU.DU₁₀ a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu-nu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 GÚ-tim ú-ṣú-bu URUDU i-na qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ra-ki-is
KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-la-áb-ra-at
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.

akk: 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-na ṣé-er {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni i-ri-šu-um i-šu a-na pá-ḫa-ar ad-ri-im i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.3333 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a
eng: Amurrum-bāni owes 8 shekels of silver to Irišum. He will pay at the gathering of the threshing floor. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 0.3333 shekel per month. Eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya.

akk: KIŠIB ša-qí-il₅
eng: Seal of the

akk: da-tim ku-li-a ší-ip-ri-im ša kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš ù kà-ri-im dur₄-ḫu-mì-it a-na kà-ar-kà-ar-ma ù wa-ba-ra-tim a-dí kà-ri-im kà-ni-iš
eng: -payers, of Kuliya, the messenger of Kanesh, and of Durhumit, to every single and the, until Kanesh.

akk: KIŠIB ma-ma-ḫi-ir
eng: Seal of Man-mahir,

akk: dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur a-lá-ḫi-im a-ḫi-šu ù šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
eng: Dan-Aššur son of Puzur-Aššur, Ali-ahum his brother and Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum; to Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB ṣí-lu-uš-da-gan KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Ṣilluš-Dagān, seal of Aššur-bāni son of Iddin-abum, seal of Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni.

akk: 20 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni ma-ma-ḫi-ir i-šu ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a a-na ša-na-at i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na 10 ma-na-e 1 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Iddin-abum son of Aššur-bāni owes 20 minas of washed copper to Man-mahir. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Buzutaya. He will pay within a year. If he has not paid he will pay interest at the rate 1 mina per 10 minas per month.

akk: KIŠIB šu-mì-a-bi-a DUMU zu-zu-ú KIŠIB lá-ba-na-da DUMU i-dí-sú-en₆ KIŠIB a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU e-na-ma-nim
eng: Seal of Šumi-abiya, son of Zuzū, seal of Labān-nādā, son of Iddin-Suen, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Ennamānum.

akk: 1 GÚ AN.NA ku-nu-ki ša a-lim{ki} i-ṣé-er a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-šu i-tù-a-ar DINGIR-šu-GAL ṣú-ḫa-ri-im ša a-šur-DU₁₀ iš-tù a-lim{ki} i-na ri-i-iš AN.NA 5 GÚ URUDU SIG₅ ma-sí-am ša-bu-ra-am a-na a-šur-DU₁₀ a-ḫu-qar i-ša-qal 1 GÚ AN.NA-ak-šu a-ḫu-qar i-lá-qé
eng: 1 talent of tin with seals of the city, Aššur-ṭāb owes to Ahu-waqar.When Ilšu-rabi, the servant of Aššur-ṭab, returns fromthe city, immediately when (he receives) the tin, 5 talents of refined copper of good quality, in pieces, Ahu-waqar will pay to Aššur-ṭāb (and) Ahu-waqar will get his 1 talent of tin.

akk: a-na lu-zi-na DUMU a-šùr-ba-ni a-dí-da DUMU wa-ar-dí-i-li-šu ù a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šùr
eng: To Luzina son of Aššur-bāni, Adida son of Warad-ilišu and Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: seal of Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU ku-sú-sà-ri-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Šu-Ištar, seal of Aššur-lamassī, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Kususārum.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí la-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kur-ub-IŠTAR ù ì-lí-iš-ta-kál a-na 4 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: <gap> mina of refined silver Aššur-lamassī owes to Lamassutum. From the week of Kurub-Ištar and Iliš-tikal he will pay in 4 months. If he does not pay, he will add interest in accordance with the regulation of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB bé-lí-a DUMU DINGIR-kur-ub KIŠIB ša-lim-a-šur DUMU {d}IM.SIG₅ KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im KIŠIB {d}UTU-a-bi DUMU sú-sà-nim
eng: Seal of Bēliya son of Ilī-kurub, seal of Šalim-Aššur son of Adad-damiq, seal of Ali-ahum son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ṭāb-pī-Aššur son of Ali-ahum, seal of Šamaš-abī son of Sūsānum.

akk: 2 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am ša DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr ki-ma {d}UTU-a-bi a-na lu-zi i-dí-nu-ma ṭup-pá-am ša lu-zi DU₁₀-pí-a-šur iḫ-ri-mu um-ma DU₁₀-pí-a-šùr-ma šu-ma URUDU i-na kà-ni-iš{ki} {d}UTU-a-bi ša ki-ma ku-a-tí il₅-qé-ú a-na 1 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-im ša tal-qé-ú 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ta-ša-qal DU₁₀-pí-a-šur ù {d}UTU-a-bi ša-bu-ú ṭup-pu-um ša 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ša ta-ar-ki-is-tí lu-zi ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar
eng: As to the 2 talents of washed copper that Ṭāb-pī-Aššur gave to Luzi on behalf of Šamaš-abī, and for which Ṭāb-pī-Aššur certified a tablet for Luzi: Ṭāb-pī-Aššur said: If your representatives have received the copper in Kanesh (from) Šamaš-abī, you must pay 2 minas of silver for every talent of washed copper." Ṭāb-pī-Aššur and Šamaš-abī have been satisfied. Any tablet concerning 2 minas of silver from the contract of Luzi that may appear will be invalid."

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šar-GAL KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im DUMU {d}AB-ba-ni KIŠIB e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in
eng: Seal of Amur-Šamaš, son of Mīšar-rabi, seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Ellil-bāni, seal of Elamma, son of Iddin-Suen,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul e-la-ma DUMU i-dí-sú-in 0.5 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er e-la-ma im-dí-lúm i-šu ITU.KAM kán-wár-ta li-mu-um i-dí-a-šùr DUMU ku-bi-dí um-ma e-la-ma-ma 1 ma-na 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-áp-kà a-mur-IŠTAR il₅-qé e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim a-mur-IŠTAR ú-kà-an-ma šu-ma i li-bi a-mur-IŠTAR lá uk-ta-in KÙ.BABBAR ù ṣí-ba-sú e-la-ma a-na im-dí-lim i-ša-qal
eng: about the debt of Elamma son of Iddin-Suen. 1 mina 6 shekels of refined silver Elamma owes to Imdī-ilum. Month IX, epoynmy of Iddin-Aššur, son of Kubīdi. Elamma said: 'Your 1 mina 6 shekels of silver Amur-Ištar has collected'. Elamma shall confirm Amur-Ištar (as having it) to Imdī-ilum and if he does not confirm that Amur-Ištar has it, Elamma will pay the silver and its interest to Imdī-ilum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi₄-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB ku-na-a DUMU ma-na-na
eng: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, son of Qa'atum, seal of Ali-ahum, son of Aššur-mālik, seal of Kunnāya, son of Manana.

akk: a-na gám-ri-im ù ḫu-lu-qá-e ša ILLAT ì-lí-a-lim a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ku-na-a a-na e-lá-ma ú-lá i-tù-ar a-na 30 ma-na AN.NA ša ku-na-a a-na ILLAT ì-li-a-lim nu-du-a-e i-dí-ú qá-de₈ ILLAT-ma a-na a-wi-tí-šu i-za-sú-um
eng: For expenses and losses of the caravan of Ilī-ālum, whatsoever, Kunnāya shall not raise claim against Elamma. As for the 30 minas of tin, for which Kunnāya served Ilī-ālum's caravan a notice, it will belong to him together with (the other members of) the caravan according to its declared value.

akk: KIŠIB MAN-a-šur
eng: Seal of Puzur-Aššur;

akk: a-na a-nu-<gap>-an
eng: to Anu<gap>

akk: KIŠIB a-lu-lá-a DUMU a-li-a KIŠIB a-šur-pì-lá-aḫ DUMU šu-a-nim
eng: Seal of Alulāya, son of Aliya, seal of Aššur-pilah, son of Šu-Anum.

akk: a-mur-IŠTAR ú en-um-a-šur iṣ-bu-tù-ni-a-tí-ma dí-šu-nu ni-dí-ma i-ta-ma a-mur-IŠTAR i-na šu-ga-ri-e ša a-šur ṭup-pá-am en-um-a-šur ša be-ú-lá-at a-bi₄-šu IGI be-lá-nim ú ma-ṣí-ì-lí DUMU bu-zu-zi-im lá ú-kà-li-mu-ma i-ta-ma-ma ú en-um-a-šur ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu en-um-a-šur a-na a-mur-IŠTAR i-dá-an ša ki-ma a-na be-ú-lá-at a-šur-i-mì-tí me-er-at e-lá-ma ú me-er-ú e-lá-ma a-na a-mur-IŠTAR lá i-tù-ru-ni ITU.1.KAM be-el-té-É.GAL-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té en-na-ma-nim a-wi-lu a-ni-ú-tum da-a-a-nu
eng: Amur-Ištar and Ennam-Aššur seized us and we passed for them the following verdict: Amur-Ištar will swear by the -emblem of Aššur that Ennam-Aššur did not show him the contract of the working capital of his father in the presence of Bēlānum and Maṣi-ilī, son of Buzuzum, and then, when he swears, Ennam-Aššur will give Amur-Ištar a tablet with his seal stating that the daughter of Elamma and the sons of Elamma will not raise claims against Amur-Ištar. Month I, eponymy of the successor of Ennamānum. The above mentioned men were judges.

akk: a-na ku-da-tim
eng: To Kudātum;

akk: KIŠIB na-áb-sú-in ù en-um-a-šùr
eng: seal of Nāb-Suen and Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-na-na
eng: Seal of Abela;

akk: a-na ili₅-ba-ni ú ki-li-il₅-zu-um
eng: to Ilī-bāni and Kililsum.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-i-mì-tí KIŠIB šu-a-nim KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-imittī, seal of Šu-Anum, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša 14 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-mur-IŠTAR i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša da-la-áš ù du-ùḫ-ni-iš a-na 43 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA i ITU.1.KAM a-1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb i-na KÙ a-nim 5 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN ša a-šùr-e-mu-qí i-šé-ra-tim wa-ar-ki-a-tim i-ma-ar
eng: Concerning 14 minas of refined silver that Iddin-abum owes to Amur-Ištar. Reckoned from the week of Dalaš and Duhniš he must pay within 43 weeks. If he has not paid within the stipulated term he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Of this silver 5.6666 minas 5 shekels belong to Aššur-emūqi. He will await the coming .

akk: KIŠIB du-šu-ba KIŠIB šu-ni-il₅-ga KIŠIB ší-li-ú-ma-an KIŠIB tal-ḫa-ma KIŠIB šar-bu-nu-a KIŠIB kà-áš-ší KIŠIB ga-dí-na
eng: Seal of Dušuba, seal of Šunilga, seal of Šiliuman, seal of Talhama, seal of Šarbunuwa, seal of Kašši, seal of Gadina.

akk: am-tám ku-zi-zi du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga a ší-mì-im i-dí-nu-ma 15 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lá-ma-sú-tum ta-áš-qú-ul-ma am-tám ku-zi-zi ta-áš-am šu-ma um-ma du-šu-ba-ma ù šu-ni-il₅-ga-ma a-ma-at-ni ni-ta-ru 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu-ma am-tám i-ta-ru šu-ma ma-ma-an i-tù-ra-am um-ma šu-ut-ma am-tum i-a-tum du-šu-ba ú šu-ni-il₅-ga ú É-sú-nu a-da-ga-al šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR-pì lá i-ta-ad-nu-nim am-tum ku-zi-zi am-tí ù a ší-mì-im a-da-ší
eng: The slave-girl Kuzizi Dušuba and Šunilga sold her and 15 shekels of silverLamassutum paid and bought the slave-girl Kuzizi. If Dušuba and Šunilga say: We want to take our slave-girl along", they will pay 0.5 mina of silver and then they can take the slave-girl along. If anybody vindicates her, saying: "The slave-girl is mine!" then I have a claim on Dušuba and Šunilga and their house. Should they not give me my silver then the slave-girl Kuzizi is my slave-girl and I can sell her."

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-emūqi, seal of Ennam-Aššur, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im <gap> KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na a-lá-ak šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul a-na ma-na-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb ša a-šùr-ma-lik <gap>
eng: Concerning Iddin-abum's debt. <gap> he will pay refined silver before Šu-Illil arrives. If he has not paid, he will pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Concerning Aššur-malik.

akk: KIŠIB šu-mì-a-bi₄-a DUMU a-ba-ra-a KIŠIB en-na-nim DUMU šu-ḫu-bur KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU a-šùr-ták-lá-ku
eng: Seal of Šumi-abia, son of Abaraya, seal of Ennānum, son of Šu-hubur, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Aššur-taklāku.

akk: 3 <gap> KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am a-na PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a šu-mì ir-ma-a-šùr a-šùr-DU₁₀ iš-qú-ul a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu PUZUR₄.IŠTAR a-na ir-ma-a-šùr lá i-tù-ar iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša kur-ub-IŠTAR ITU.KAM ša sá-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí en-na-sú-en₆
eng: 3.6666? shekels of refined silver Aššur-ṭāb paid to Puzur-Ištar in the name of Ir'am-Aššur. Puzur-Ištar will not come back for anything, whatsoever, on Ir'am-Aššūr. From the week of Kurub-Ištar, month III of the eponymy of the successor of Ennam-Suen

akk: KIŠIB ku-zi-zi-a
eng: Seal of Kuziziya;

akk: a-na en-um-a-šur DUMU šál-ma-a-šùr ù šu-be-lim
eng: to Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur, and Šu-Bēlum.

akk: a-na a-ta-ta DUMU ma-num-ba-lúm-a-šùr ù kà-nu-tim DUMU.MÍ en-na-sú-in
eng: To Atata, son of Mannum-balum-Assur, and Kannutum, daughter of Ennam-Suen.

akk: KIŠIB a-na-aḫ-ì-lí DUMU DU₁₀-ṣí-lá-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Anah-ili, son of Tab-silli-Assur

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the

akk: kà-ni-iš a-na ú-bar-tim ša ku-bu-ur-na-at
eng: Kanesh colony; to the station at Kuburnat.

akk: KIŠIB ú-ra-a-a DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na
eng: Seal of Uraya son of Manana, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Manana.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš-ki i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in bu-zu-ta-a ša-li-iš-ni
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger. Buzutaya was our third man.

akk: KIŠIB ú-zu-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB sú-kà-lim DUMU i-dí-sú-in
eng: Seal of Uzua, seal of Iddin-abum, seal of Sukkallum son of Iddin-Suen.

akk: 11.5 ma-na URUDU ší-ku-um i-ṣé-er sú-kà-lim lu-zi i-šu ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ku-bi-a ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Sukkallum owes 11.5 minas of -copper to Luzi. Month Ab-šarrāni, eponymy Kūbiya. He must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku DUMU i-ku-nim KIŠIB pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-SIPA
eng: Seal of Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum, seal of Aššur-taklāku son of Ikūnum, seal of Pilah-Ištar son of Aššur-rēʾī.

akk: 6.8333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-SIPA DAM.GÀR i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša en-na-sú-in DUMU ku-ra-ra a-na 7 ḫa-am-ša-tim KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.1.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.1.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um šu-sú-in DUMU ba-bi-lim 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na šu-IŠTAR DUMU ma-li-ki-il₅-šu áš-qúl 2.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na a-lá-ni ša-ar-ša-ra-ni áš-qú-ul-ma a-na mu-za a-dí-in 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ší-im 2 iš-ra-tim a-na a-šur-ma-lik DUMU lu-zi-na mì-ma a-nim a-šu-mì ku-da-tim ú-ša-qí-il₅
eng: Pilah-Ištar son of Aššur-rēʾī owes 6.8333 minas of refined silver to the merchant. Reckoned from the week of Enna-Suen son of Kurara he will pay back the silver in 7 weeks. If he has not paid back at the completion of his term, he will add interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Month Ab-šarrāni, in the eponymy Šu-Suen son of Babilum. I paid 3 shekels of silver to Šu-Ištar son of Malik-ilišu. I paid 2.5 shekels of silver for a -measure of acorns and gave them to Muza. 2 shekels of silver, the price of 2 belts for Aššur-malik son of Luzina. All this I paid on behalf of Kudātum.

akk: KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a DUMU a-šur-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Ikūn-pīya son of Aššur-bāni;

akk: a-na en-um-a-šur i-dí-a-bi-im ù lá-qé-ep <gap>
eng: to Ennam-Aššur, Iddin-abum and Lā-qēp <gap>

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Amur-Ištar;

akk: a-na kà-lá-mu-ur
eng: to Kalamur.

akk: KIŠIB du-du-li GAL ma-ḫi-ri-im KIŠIB šu-pì-aḫ-šu KIŠIB lu-ḫu-du-ma-an KIŠIB šu-pì-aḫ-šu KIŠIB ba-ba-ší-ba
eng: Seal of Duduli, head of the market, seal of Šuppiahšu, seal of Luhuduman, seal of Šuppiahšu, seal of Babašiba,

akk: ša 3 ANŠE ší-im-tí ba-ba-ší-ba ù šu-pì-aḫ-šu ú-ta-ru-ni-ni-ma 2-ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-al-DU₁₀ i-ša-qú-lu-ni šu-ma ANŠE ší-im-tí la ú-ta-e-ru-ni 2 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ba-ba-ší-ba ù šu-pì-aḫ-šu i-ša-qú-lu
KIŠIB a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim DUMU zu-ba KIŠIB i-dí-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB en-num-a-šur DUMU a-šur-UTU KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim
eng: Seal of Aššur-bēl-awātim, seal of Zuba, seal of Iddin-Ištar, son of Aššur-mālik, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Aššur-šamšī, seal of Abu-šalim, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim en-na-sú-in i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kà-ší-im ša qá-té a-šur-ma-lik ú en-na-sú-in ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-ì-lí li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-na-da DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-na 6 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal 10 GÍN wa-ar-kà-tám a-na 10 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im i ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR ik-ri-bu ša a-šur
eng: 28 shekels of refined silver Abu-šalim, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, owes to Ennam-Suen.From the week of the official who took over from Aššur-mālik,and Ennam-Suen, month IV, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna, he will pay 8 shekelswithin 3 weeks, 10 shekels within 6 weeks he will pay, and 10 shekels he will pay later, within another 10 weeks. If he does not pay when his term is over he will add interest per month in accordance with the regulation of the colony. The silver istemple fund of Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB šu-ku-bi-im DUMU qá-a-tim KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU ú-sà-ri-a KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí
eng: Seal of Šu-Kūbum, son of Qa'atum, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Uṣāriya, seal of Šu-Ištar, son of Dadānum, seal of Aššur-lamassī,

akk: ša 1 me-at 5 TÚG ku-ta-nu 4 GÚ 20 ma-na AN.NA ku-nu-ki 40 ma-na AN.NA qá-tim 13 TÚG šu-ru-tum qá-dum ša li-wi-tim 6 ANŠE 4 TÚG ku-ta-ni ša kà-ṣa-ri 1 TÚG ku-ta-nu ša ì-lí-a mì-ma a-nim a-na lá-qé-pí-im ni-ip-qí-id
eng: concerning 105 -textiles, 4 talents 20 minas of tin under seals, 40 minas of loose tin, 13 dark textiles, including those for wrapping, 6 donkeys, 4 -textiles of the transporters, 1 -textile of Iliya - all this we entrusted to Lā-qēpum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zi-ki-ki DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU PUZUR₄.IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zikiki son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Abu-šalim son of Puzur-Ištar.

akk: 6 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-bu-ša-lim i-ri-šum i-šu a-na bu-qú-nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 0.1666 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Abu-šalim owes 6 shekels of refined silver to Irišum. He will pay at the shearing. If he has not paid, he will add 1 / 6 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-emūqī, seal of Ennam-Aššur s. of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 13.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um u₄-mu-šu ma-al-ú ša a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Concerning Iddin-abum's debt of 13.3333 minas of refined silver. His term has expired. Concerning Amur-Ištar.

akk: KIŠIB la-qé-pì-im DUMU i-li-a KIŠIB a-mur-{d}UTU DUMU mì-šu-ra-bi KIŠIB e-zé DUMU ša-ru-ki-in KIŠIB gal-da-a
eng: Seal of Lāqēpum, son of Iliya; seal of Amur-Šamaš, son of Mīšu(r)-rabi; seal of Ezē, son of Šarrum-kēn; seal of Galdaya,

akk: ša e-lá-ma ù gal-da-a ni-kà-sí i-sí-ú-ma lu gám-ru-um ša ḫa-ra-nim lu ú-ku-ul-tù-šu ba-ti-iq 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er gal-da-a DUMU na-ku e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù i-ku-nim 1.5 GÍN.TA a ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um a-bi₄-a DUMU šu-da-ga-an a-ḫa-ma ṭup-pu-um ḫa-ar-mu-um ša be-ú-lá-ti-šu i-ba-ší a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim ni-ìš a-lim{ki} nu-ta-mì-šu-nu
eng: (witnessing) that Elamma and Galdaya settled accounts with the result that after both travel expenses and his food allowance have been deducted, Elamma (still) has a claim of 1 mina of refined silver on Galdaya, the son of Naku. From the week of Amriya and Ikūnum he will add 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month VII, year-eponymy of Abiya, son of Šu-Dagan. Separately, there still exists a valid record of his working capital. We made them swear an oath by the City for these words.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU ša-lim-a-šur
eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB zu-ku-a DUMU a-šur-i-dí
eng: seal of Zukuwa son of Aššūr-idī.

akk: KIŠIB a-la-bi-im DUMU sú-li-a KIŠIB ki-li-a DUMU en-na-nim
eng: Seal of Ali-abum son of Ṣuliya, seal of Kiliya son of Ennānum.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša IGI GÍR ša {d}a-šùr a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um dur₄-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Tablet from before Aššur's dagger. The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony.

akk: KIŠIB ša-ar-ni-ga-a-šu KIŠIB e-na-a-šur DUMU <gap> KIŠIB wa-al-ḫi-iš-na KIŠIB pé-ru-wa KIŠIB tù-wa-tù-ú-i
eng: Seal of Šarnigāšu, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of <gap>, seal of Walhišna, seal of Peruwa, seal of Tuwatuwi.

akk: <gap> šu-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-<gap>
eng: If they pay the silver <gap>

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB en-num-a-šur KIŠIB en-num-a-šur
eng: Seal of Aššur-idī, seal of Ennam-Aššur, seal of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul en-num-a-šur 0.6666 ma-na 5 GÍN AN.NA i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR ú PUZUR₄-ša-du-e a-na ITU.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ku-zal-li li-mu-um {d}UTU-ba-ni
eng: Concerning Ennam-Aššur's debt. Ennam-Aššur owes 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of tin to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī and Puzur-šadu'e he must pay in one month. If he has not paid, he will add (interest) at the rate 3 shekels per mina. Month Kuzallu, eponymy Šamaš-bāni.

akk: KIŠIB a-zu-a DUMU sú-kà-lim KIŠIB en-na-ni-a DUMU i-zi-za-am-ì-lí KIŠIB en-nam-aš-šùr DUMU a-al-DU₁₀
eng: Seal of Azua, son of Sukkallum, seal of Ennāniya, son of Izzizam-ilī, seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Āl-ṭāb,

akk: ša 20-ma-na URUDU ša a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ḫa-bu-lu-ni šu-ma a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-mur-a-šur ša-bu ša 12.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR-im 1 ma-na-um 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR en-nam-a-šur DUMU a-al-DU₁₀ a-na a-al-DU₁₀ DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ i-ša-qal
eng: that as for the 20 minas of copper, which Āl-ṭāb, son of Aššur-ṭāb, owes to Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, if Āl-ṭāb, son of Amur-Aššur, has already

akk: KIŠIB a-ta-ta DUMU ša-lim-a-šur KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB en-um-A-šur
eng: Seal of Atata son of Šalim-Aššur, seal of Lā-qēp son of Aššur-idī, seal of Ennam-Aššur,

akk: wa-ar-dum ša ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er en-um-a-šur lu-zi-i šu 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR en-um-a-šur i-na ša-na-at ú-šé-lá-am šu-ma a-dí ša-na-at ku-ta-na-am lá uš-té-li-am i-ša-qal ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um e-lá-lí sà-an-gu₅-um
eng: huraṣānum's slave. Ennam-Aššur owes 5 shekels of silver to Luzi. Ennam-Aššur must bring up one -textile worth 5 shekels of silver within one year. If he has not brought up a within a year, he must pay 10 shekels of silver here. Month Te'inātum, eponymy Elālī, the high priest.

akk: ša-lim-a-šùr DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃ ù a-šu-wa-an-zi DUMU ḫa-ar-ša ša dí-nam ru-ba-um ù GAL sí-ki-tim dí-nam i-dí-nu-ni-ma ṣú-ḫa-ra-am ša šál-ma-a-šùr a-na i-id i-dí-nu-ni ša-lim-a-šùr ù a-šu-wa-an i-mì-ig-ru-ma ni-iš a-na ni-iš {d}a-šùr ni-iš ru-ba-im ni-iš GAL sí-ki-tim wa-li-iš-ra ù ni-iš e-ba-ru-tim ša a-wa-tí-šu-nu ig-mu-ru-ni it-mu-ú-ma 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ù 1 TÚG ku-ta-nam ša-lim-a-šur a-na a-šu-wa-an i-dí-in-ma a-šu-wa-an ù a-ḫu-šu me-er-ú ḫa-ar-ša-a a-na ša-lim-a-šùr me-er-e-šu ù me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu ù-lá i-tù-ru šu-ma i-tù-ru lá-am-nu-ut a-na a-šùr ru-ba-im ù GAL sí-ki-tim
eng: Šalim-Aššur son of Issu-arik and Aššuwan(zi) son of Harša, for whom the king and the rabi sikkitim had given a verdict, stating that they should give a servant of Šalim-Aššur to the river ordeal - Šalim-Aššur and Aššuwan reached an agreement and they swore an oath by Anna, Aššur, the king, the rabi sikkitim Wališra and by the colleagues who settled their affair, so that Šalim-Aššur gave 1 min of silver and 1 kutānu-textile to Aššuwan, and Aššuwan and his brothers, sons of Harša, will not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur, his sons and Iddin-abum's sons for anything whatsoever. If they raise claim, it is an evil against Anna, Aššur, the king and the rabi sikkitim.

akk: KIŠIB ku-ra-áš-mì-iš DUMU GAL-na-pá-ḫi-im KIŠIB bu-li-na DUMU ra-bi₄-ša-qí-im KIŠIB šé-zu-ur DUMU kà-zu-ba KIŠIB a-šu-wa-an DUMU ḫa-ar-ša KIŠIB a-zu DUMU kà-zu KIŠIB ú-ra-a KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni me-er-ú ma-na-na KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ KIŠIB a-de₈-lá-at DUMU {d}IM-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Kurašmiš son of the chief of smiths, seal of Bulina son of the chief cupbearer, seal of Šezur son of Kazuba, seal of Ašuwan son of Harša, seal of Azu son of Kazu, seal of Uraya and the seal of Amurrum-bāni, sons of Manana, seal of Zuba son of Ištar-pālil, seal of Adad-ellat son of Adad-bāni.

akk: KIŠIB lu-zi-na KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀
eng: Seal of Luzina, seal of Aššur-ṭāb,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šur-ba-ni DUMU sú-ku-ku 0.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR a-na e-tí-šu i-ša-qal šu-ma lá ìš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-um 0.3333 ma-na i-lá-ak-šu-um a-na 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ḫi-na-a i-šé-e-šu ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um ip-ḫu-ru-um
eng: of the debt of Aššur-bāni, son of Sukkuku. He will pay 0.6666 mina of silver at the agreed time. If he does not pay per mina 0.3333 mina will amount for him (and) hinnāya will sue him for 1 mina of silver. Month V, eponymy of Iphurum.

akk: KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU um-ma-sá
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ummassa.

akk: a-šur-DÙL DUMU a-šùr-ša-dí-li ki-ma ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im a-na a-šur-e-mu-qí DUMU šu-ra-ma iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-šur-DÙL-ma KÙ.BABBAR-áp be-lúm-ba-ni DAM.GÀR-ri-im ša ku-li-a tal-qé lá tal-qé-e IGI a-ni-e-ma i-ki-ir ú-ul kà-i-in um-ma a-šur-e-mu-qí-ma al-qé ú al-qé-ma ú u₄-ma-am a-lá-qé-ma a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-eš TUR.GAL i-dí-na-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU i-tur₄-a-num tap-pá-i
eng: Aššur-ṣulūlī, son of Aššur-šād-ilī representing Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, seized us against Aššur-emūqī, son of Šu-rama, and Aššur-ṣulūlī said as follows: The silver of Bēlum-bāni, the agent of Kuliya, did you take it, yes or no? Deny or confirm before these men. Aššur-emūqī said: I took it, yes I took it and today I would (again) take it! For this affair the plenary Kanesh 'gave' me (as witness) and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony. Aššur-lamassī, son of Itūr-Anum, was my companion.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-lá-ma-sí DUMU i-tur₄-a-num
eng: Seal of Aššur-lamassī, son of Itūr-Anum.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of Kanesh.

akk: kà-ni-iš a-na ku-li-a ša-qí-il₅ da-tim ší-ip-ri-ni kà-ar kà-ar-ma a-le sú-kà-li-a DUMU a-šùr-iš-tí-kál wa-áš-bu-ni ṣa-ḫe-er GAL
eng: To Kuliya, the-payer, our messenger, to every single, wherever Sukkaliya, son of Aššuriš-tikal is staying, small and big.

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB en-nam-a-šur DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im
eng: Seal of Amur-Ištar, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi₄-im 20 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a a-na 13 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma lá-ma u₄-mu-šu im-lu-ú-ni ṭup-pu-šu ša na-ru-qí-šu il₅-ta-áp-tù 5 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì šu-{d}EN.LÍL i-lá-pá-at
eng: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum: Reckoned from the week of Libbaya he must pay 20 minas of refined silver within 13 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. If they have written the tablet for his joint-stock investment before the completion of his term, he shall book 5 minas of gold in Šu-Illil's name.

akk: KIŠIB ma-num DUMU kà-bi-a KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU šu-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-ḫu-šu DUMU a-šur-i-dí KIŠIB šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur
eng: Seal of Manum, son of Kabiya, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Šu-Ištar, seal of Ahušu, son of Aššur-idī, seal of Šu-Ellil, son of Mannu-kī-Aššur.

akk: 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tám dam-qám i-ṣé-er šu-{d}EN.LÍL DUMU ma-nu-ki-a-šur iš-ma-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-lu-ma-a ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um sá-ma-a a-na <gap> ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: 5 minas of good quality ilver Šu-Elil, son of Mannu-kī-Aššur, owes to Išme-Aššur, son of hinnāya. From the week of Kulumaya, month V, year eponymy of Samaya, he will pay within <gap> weeks; if he does not pay he will add in accordance with the regulation of the colony an interest of 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-na DUMU i-dí-{d}IM KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim KIŠIB en-um-a-šur ŠEŠ-šu KIŠIB i-ku-pì-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a
eng: Seal of Puzur-Anna, son of Iddin-Adad, seal of āmur-Aššur, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, seal of Ennam-Aššur, his brother, seal of Ikūn-pī-Aššur, son of hinnāya.

akk: 5 GÚ URUDU ma-sí-am i-ṣé-er a-mur-a-šur DUMU a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim ù en-um-a-šur a-ḫi-šu li-ip-it-IŠTAR i-šu a-na MU.5.ŠÈ i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu 1.5 ma-na.TA i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu i-ku-pì-a-šur DUMU ḫi-na-a qá-ta-tum ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um bu-zu-ta-a
eng: 5 talents of refined copper āmur-Aššur, son of Aššur-bēl-awātim, <and> Ennam-Aššur, his brother, owe to Lipit-Ištar. They will pay in 5 years; when they do not pay they will add 1.5 mina per (talent) per month as interest. Ikūn-pī-Aššur, son of hinnāya, is guarantor. Month VII, eponymy year of Buzutaya.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB MAN-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan
eng: seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan.

akk: a-na a-šur-ni-im-ri ù a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: To Aššur-nimrī and Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB šu-zu-zu DUMU a-šur-SIPA
eng: Seal of Šu-Zuzu son of Aššur-rē'ī.

akk: KIŠIB a-dí-da
eng: Seal of Adida;

akk: a-na be-lu-ba-ni a-nu-pì-a ú a-lu-wa
eng: to Bēlum-bāni, Anupiya and Aluwa.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR.SIPA KIŠIB ì-lí-dan DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Ilī-rē'ī, seal of Ilī-dān, son of Amur-Ištar.

akk: 10.3333 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er ì-lí-dan e-la-ma i-šu KÙ.BABBAR i-na a-lim{ki} i-ša-qal
eng: 10.3333 shekels of refined silver Ilī-dān owes to Elamma. He will pay the silver in the City.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ú dam-qá-a
eng: To Ali-ahum and Damqaya;

akk: KIŠIB ša-ta-na
eng: seal of Šāt-Anna.

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR DUMU mì-šar-GAL KIŠIB la-qé-ep DUMU kà-a-tim KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃
eng: Seal of Amur-Ištar son of Mīšar-rabi, seal of Lā-qēp son of Kayātum, seal of Iddin-abum son of Issu-arik.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šur-{d}UTU-ši i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša a-mur-IŠTAR a-na 23 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu la iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum. Iddin-abum owes 5 minas of refined silver to Aššur-šamši. Reckoned from the week of Amur-Ištar he must pay within 23 weeks. If he has not paid within his stipulated term he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina.

akk: KIŠIB da-dí-a DUMU ba-za-za KIŠIB i-di-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-dí-sú-in KIŠIB IŠTAR-il₅-šu DUMU a-zu-za-a KIŠIB a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DUMU ì-lí-tù-ra-am
eng: Seal of Dadiya, son of Bazaza; seal of Iddin-abum, ; seal of Aššur-šamsī,

akk: 0.6666 ma-na 1 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-il₅-šu DUMU a-zu-za-a a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫu-ra-ṣa-nim ù a-šur-ma-lik li-mu-um a-lá-ḫu-um DUMU i-na-aḫ-DINGIR 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: . 0.6666 mina 5 shekels of refined silver Ištar-ilšu, son of Azuzaya, owes to Aššur-ṭāb, son of Elamma. From the week of hurāṣānum and Aššur-mālik, eponymy of Alī-ahum, son of Īnah-ilī, he will add 1.5 shekel per mina as interest." "

akk: KIŠIB sú-en-na-da DUMU e-nam-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Suen-nādā son of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí a-dí-in šu-ku-bu-um DUMU a-šur-i-dí ù i-dí-IŠTAR DUMU a-šur-na-da tap-pá-ú-a
eng: § The Kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and I gave my testimony before Aššur's dagger. Šu-Kūbum son of Aššur-idī and Iddin-Ištar son of Aššur-nādā were my (absent) partners.

akk: a-na en-na-nim DUMU a-bi₄-a ú a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šùr
eng: To Ennānum son of Abiya and Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur
eng: seal of Puzur-Aššur.

akk: a-na pí-la-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU a-šùr-SIPA ú a-mur-IŠTAR ni-a-im
eng: To Pilah-Ištar son of Aššur-rēʾī and our own Amur-Ištar;

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šùr DUMU ša-lim-a-šùr
eng: seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-de₈-lá-at KIŠIB ir-am-{d}a-šùr DUMU i-dí-ba-ni KIŠIB pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR DUMU i-bi₄-sú-a
eng: Seal of Adad-ellat, seal of Ir'am-Aššur, son of Idi-bāni, seal of Pilah-Ištar, son of Ibisua,

akk: ša 12 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-al-DU₁₀ a-na kur-ub-sú-in ḫa-bu-lu-ma en-na-sú-in qá-ta-tù-ni 12 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ki-ma <gap>
eng: to the effect that Āl-ṭāb owes 12 shekels of silver to Kurub-Suen and Ennam-Suen is guarantorThe 12 shekels of silver instead of <gap>

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-ták-lá-ku DUMU i-ku-nim KIŠIB ki-nam-a-šùr DUMU ba-ba-lim KIŠIB a-šur-na-da DUMU ḫa-pu-a-lá
eng: Seal of Assur-taklaku, son of Ikunum, seal of Kinam-Assur, son of Babalum, seal of Assur-nada, son of Happuala,

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul a-šùr-na-da DUMU ḫa-pu-a-lá 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SAḪAR.BA i-ṣé-er a-šùr-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu ITU.1.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um ša qá-té a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ì-lí-a-lim a-na ITU.6.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA KÙ.BABBAR i-na ITU.1.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR-ru-um a-ma-kam tù-ur-IŠTAR DUMU zu-ma-<gap> be-lá-a-wa-tim ša-i-il₅-šu
eng: of the debt of Assur-nada, son of Happuala. 10 shekels of 'dust silver' Assur-nada owes to the creditor. Month VI, eponymy of the successor of Abu-salim, son of Ili-alum. He will pay within 6 months, if he does not pay he will add 1.5 shekel of silver per month as interest per mina. The bearer of this tab let is the creditor. Over there Turi-Istar, son of Zuma-x, (is) the litigant, ask him.

akk: KIŠIB IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB ni-mar-IŠTAR DUMU ba-la KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ì-lí-a-lúm
eng: Seal of Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Nimar-Ištar, son of Bala, seal of Abu-šalim, son of Ilī-ālum.

akk: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni ITU.KAM ṭí-i-na-tim 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um
eng: 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, owes to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of Ellil-bāni, month X, he will add 1 shekel per month for this silver. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akk: KIŠIB IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-šùr-iš-ti-kál DUMU ḫi-na-a KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU sú-sà-a-a KIŠIB PÚZUR.IŠTAR DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU ga-zi-a KIŠIB áb-ša-lim
eng: Seal of Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Aššuriš-tikal, son of hinnāya, seal of Ali-ahum, son of Susāya, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Bēlum-bāni, son of Gaziya, seal of Ab-šalim,

akk: DAM a-lá-ḫi-im 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ áb-ša-lim DAM a-lá-ḫi-im ù DUMU-e a-lá-ḫi-im DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-a ITU.KAM kán-war-ta 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um i ša-ḫa-at áb-ša-lim ú me-er-e a-
eng: the wife of Ali-ahum. 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, Ab-šalim, the wife of Ali-ahum, and the sons of Ali-ahum owe to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of hanāya, month IX, they will add 1.5 shekel as interest per month per mina. The silver is bound on the one of them who is solvent and reliable. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur,

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan
eng: seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan.

akk: KIŠIB da-da-a DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB ì-lí-TAB.BA DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀ KIŠIB a-šùr-SIPA DUMU a-šur-iš-tí-kál
eng: Seal of Dadaya son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Ilī-tappā'ī son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Aššur-rē'ī son of Aššuriš-tikal.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-šur-SIPA DUMU a-šur-iš-tí-kál a-lá-ḫu-um i-šu ITU.1.KAM ša sà-ra-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-šur-i-mì-tí ma-lá-ḫi-im 0.3333 ma-na.TA i-na ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ma-lá u₄-me-šu 0.3333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul 0.5 GÍN.TA a-na 0.3333 ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-ab
eng: Aššur-rē'ī son of Aššuriš-tikal owes 1 mina of silver to Ali-ahum. Month Ša-sarrātim, eponymy after that of Aššur-imittī the skipper. He will pay 0.3333 mina per year. If he has not paid 0.3333 mina of silver when his term is up, he will add interest at the rate 0.5 shekel per 0.3333 mina per month.

akk: KIŠIB ku-ku-a DUMU ma-nu-ki-ì-lí-a KIŠIB da-da-a DUMU bu-zi KIŠIB ì-lí-dan DUMU i-dí-a-šùr
eng: Seal of Kukuwa son of Mannum-kī-iliya, seal of Dadaya son of Buzi, seal of Ilī-dan son of Iddin-Aššur.

akk: 21 GÚ ša-áp-tám ša kà-né-eš ša É.GAL-lim en-um-a-šùr DUMU šál-ma-a-šur a-na ì-lí-dan i-na ku-bur-na-at i-ša-qal-ma ṣú-ḫa-ru ša en-um-a-šùr ša-lim-ar-dí 21 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A i-na ku-bur-na-at ú-sà-na-aq-šu-ma ANŠE.ḪI.A ša en-nam-a-šur SÍG.ḪI.A a-na tù-ku-ub-tù ú-šé-ru-ú i-na ri-iš SÍG.ḪI.A ša i-ša-qú-lu-šu-ni 6.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR li-tí SIG₅ ì-lí-dan DUMU i-dí-a-šur a-na en-um-a-šur i-ša
eng: Ennam-Aššur son of Šalim-Aššur shall give 21 talents of wool from Kanesh, from the palace, to Ilī-dan in Kuburnat, Ennam-Aššur's servant Šalim-wardī shall check the 21 talents of wool in Kuburnat, and on Ennam-Aššur's donkeys they will have brought the wool to Tukubtu. From the capital on the wool that they are going to pay him, Ilī-dan son of Iddin-Aššur shall give 6.6666 minas of good -silver to Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-{d}EN.ZU KIŠIB šu-bé-lim KIŠIB <gap>
eng: Seal of Puzur-Suen, seal of Šu-Bēlum, seal of <gap>.

akk: 1 GÚ LÁ 10 ma-na URUDU i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄-{d}EN.ZU e-lá-ma i-šu i-na ad-ri-im i-ša-qal URUDU ta-pá-ša-ta-i-am za-ak-wa-am šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it ṣí-ib-ta-am ú-ṣa-áb 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-ḫa-ma i-na ku-bu-ur ú-ṭí-tí-im i-na kà-ni-iš i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul i tù-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-ṣé-ri-šu a-lá-qé
eng: 50 minas of copper Puzur-Suen owes to Elamma. At the time of the threshing he will weigh out pure copper of Tappašatta. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the Durhumit colony. Separately he will pay 10 shekels of silver in Kanesh, when the barley is ripe. If he does not pay I will collect it in Durhumit for his account.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU DINGIR-ba-ni KIŠIB a-la-ḫi-im DUMU i-na-aḫ-DINGIR KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR DUMU mì-šu-GAL KIŠIB a-gu-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-malik son of Ilī-bāni, seal of Ali-ahum son of Inah-ilī, seal of Amur-Ištar son of Miššu-rabi, seal of Aguwa, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša 24 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-bi-im a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-šu-ú iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša li-ba-a ù ì-lí-iš-tí-kál a-na 20 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.1.KAM ú-ṣa-áb šu-ma ṭup-pu-šu i-lá-pu-tù 6 ma-na KÙ.GI šu-mì a-šùr-be-el-a-wa-tim i-lá-pá-at
eng: Concerning 24 minas of refined silver that Iddin-abum owes to Aššur-bēl-awātim. Reckoned from the week if Libbaya and Iliš-tikal he must pay within 20 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per mina per month. If they write his tablet, he must book 6 minas of gold in the name of Aššur-bēl-awātim.

akk: a-na i-tur₄-DINGIR
eng: To Itūr-ilī;

akk: KIŠIB en-na-sú-in
eng: seal of Enna-Suen.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the

akk: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma a-na lu-qú-tim ma-la a-na a-šur-be-el-a-wa-tim i-pí-iq-du-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ú-šé-ṣí-ú ṭup-pá-am ša ku-nu-ki-šu ša-lim-a-šùr a-na šu-ku-bi-im i-da-an a-na kur-ub-IŠTAR šu-ku-bu-um ú-lá i-tù-a-ar šu-ma a-na šu-ku-bi-im ma-ma-an i-tù-a-ar ša-lim-a-šùr ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: Kanesh colony. The colony has passed a verdict: for all the goods that were entrusted to Aššur-bēl-awātim, and which Šalim-Aššur had taken out, Šalim-Aššur will give a tablet bearing his seal to Šu-Kūbum. Šu-Kūbum will not raise claim against Kurub-Ištar. If anyone raises claim against Šu-Kūbum, Šalim-Aššur will clear him.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-dan DUMU i-ku-pì-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR KIŠIB a-šur-ták-lá-ku DUMU ḫu-li-a
eng: Seal of Aššur-dān, son of Ikūn-pīya, seal of Iddin-abum, son of Itūr-ilī, seal of Aššur-taklāku, son of huliya.

akk: 30 ma-na SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim <gap>-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ṣé-er a-šur-ták-lá-ku DUMU ḫu-li-a lá-ma-sà-tum tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-qá a-na ITU.2.KAM ù-šé-ba-lam šu-ma lá ú-uš-té-bi₄-lam-ma a É a-lim{ki} i-ta-lá-ak i-na tù-wa-ri-šu 1 GÚ SÍG.ḪI.A na-ar-ba-tim ša-kà-ki-iš i-ša-qal ITU.1.KAM ku-zal-lu li-mu-um a-šur-na-da DUMU PUZUR₄-a-na
eng: 30 <minas> of soft, <gap> woolfor making the weft Aššur-taklāku, son of huliya, owes to Lamassutum. He will send it from haqa within two months. If he has not sent it and has departed for? the City he will weigh out on his return one talent of soft wool for making the weft. Month XI, eponymy of Aššur-nādā, son of Puzur-Anna

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur ù zu-ku-a
eng: To Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur and Zukuwa;

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU a-šur-dan
eng: seal of Puzur-Aššur son of Aššur-dan.

akk: KIŠIB <gap>-a-šur KIŠIB a-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku KIŠIB qá-ta-tim
eng: Seal of <gap>-Aššur, seal of Aššur-taklāku, seal of Qatātum.

akk: 4.1666 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR <gap> i-ṣé-er ga-ta-tim DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša KÁ-zi-a ù šu-ku-bi₄-im ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR <gap> ib-ni-<gap>
eng: 4.1666 shekels of silverQatatum owes tothe creditor. Reckoning fromthe week eponymy of Kaziya and Šu-Kūbum he will add interest per month according to the regulation of the . <gap> Ibni- <gap>

akk: KIŠIB sú-kà-lí-a DUMU a-mur-a-šùr KIŠIB a-ku-za DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB ú-ra-a DUMU ma-na-na
eng: Seal of Sukkalliya son of Amur-Aššur, seal of Akuza son of Šu-Anum, seal of Uraya son of Manana.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am ší-bu-tí-ni IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave the tablet with our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB ba-zi-a DUMU DINGIR-kur-ub KIŠIB a-ḫu-qar DUMU zu-ur-zu-ur KIŠIB i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU
eng: Seal of Baziya son of Ilī-kurub, seal of Ahu-waqar son of Zurzur, seal of Irišum son of Amur-Šamaš.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-ri-ší-im <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ri-ší-im tám-kà-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša <gap> na <gap> GÍN ší-im UDU <gap> 2 GÍN a-ḫa-ma a-dí-na-kum 1 ma-na ša ṭup-pí-šu 12 GÍN e-li-um KI en-na-nim mu-ša-ri-dim <gap>
eng: Concerning Irišum's debt: Irišum owes <gap> minas of refined silver to the merchant. Reckoned from the week of <gap> he will pay <gap> shekels, the price of a sheep <gap> I also gave him 2 shekels. 1 mina from his tablet, 12 shekels on top, owed by Ennānum the . <gap>

akk: KIŠIB ḫi-na-a KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a-šùr DUMU en-um-a-šur
eng: Seal of hinnāya, seal of Ikuppi-Aššur, son of Ennam-Aššur,

akk: ša 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR me-eḫ-ra-at ba-áb-tí-šu ša lá-qé-ep e-lá-ma a-na lá-qé-ep ú-šé-bi-lu lá-qé-ep KÙ.BABBAR-áp-šu i-lá-qé ŠÀ.BA 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ši-im 0.5 ku-ta-nim ṣa-ḫu-ru
eng: that Elamma sent to Lā-qēp 1.5 mina of silver as counter value of Lā-qēp's outstanding claims. Lā-qēp will take his silver (and) from it 5 shekels of silver, the price of 0.5 -textile, have been deducted.

akk: a-na a-la-ḫi-im
eng: To Ali-ahum;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: seal of Amur-Ištar.

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-{d}IM DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-<gap> KIŠIB a-šur-<gap>-šu-um
eng: Seal of Iddin-Adad son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu<gap>, seal of Aššur-<gap>

akk: <gap> ša a-lu-lá-a <gap> ša a-dí <gap>
KIŠIB zu-ba DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB PUZUR₄-{d}IŠKUR DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Zuba, son of Ennānum, seal of Puzur-Adad, son of Iddin-Ištar;

akk: a-lá-bu-um DUMU zi-a tap-pá-i-ni a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-né-eš i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma ṭup-pá-am IGI IGI GÍR ša a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: Ali-abum, son of Ziya, was our companion. For these words the Kaneš colony made us available and this tablet we gave as our testimony rendered before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB i-pí-lí-is KIŠIB a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-sú KIŠIB la-qé-pí-im
eng: Seal of Ippilis, seal of Aššur-nādā, son of Amur-ilūssu, seal of Lā-qēpum,

akk: ša e-la-ma ù id-na-a ma-aḫ-ri-ni ni-kà-sé i-sí-ú-ma 0.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pu-um ù 13.5 ma-na URUDU SIG₅ i-lí-bi na-a iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša am-ri-a ù e-lá-lí ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im a-na ṣí-ib-tim i-lá-ak-šum 1.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣí-ib-tum pá-ni-tum 0.8333 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR gám-ru-um ša iš-ta-pu-ru-šu-ni i li-bi₄-šu-ma
eng: that Elamma and Idnāya settled accounts in our presence (with the following result): 35 shekels of refined silver and 13.5 minas of refined copper are due by Idnāya. They become interest-bearing for him at the rate stipulated by the colony from the week-eponymy of Amriya and Elālī. 1.5 mina of silver, an earlier interest, (and) 0.8333 mina of silver, expenses, about which he wrote him repeatedly, he also owes.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Aššur-bāni;

akk: a-na šu-pè-e-nu-ma-an DUMU ma-lá <gap> a <gap>
eng: to Šuppinuman son of Mala<gap>

akk: KIŠIB ib-ni-{d}IM KIŠIB id-na-a KIŠIB a-zu-za-a
eng: Seal of Ibnī-Adad, seal of Idnaya, seal of Azuzaya.

akk: ša be-ú-lá-at PUZUR₄-ša-du-e ṭup-pu-um ša e-li-a-ni sà-ar ša ku-nu-ki ša i-ri-ší-im
eng: Concerning Puzur-šadu'e's working capital: any tablet that may appear is invalid - one with Irišum's seal.

akk: KIŠIB šu-nu-nu DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB zu-zu DUMU en-um-ì-lí KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-lá-áb-ra-at KIŠIB šu-be-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Šu-Nūnu son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Zuzu son of Ennam-ilī, seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat, seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-bé-lim DUMU ili₅-ba-ni i-ri-šum i-šu a-na 2 ITU.KAM i-ša-qal ITU.KAM na-ar-ma-ak a-šur ša ke-na-tim li-mu-um ša qá-tí a-mur-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 3 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Šu-Bēlum son of Ilī-bāni owes <gap> minas of silver to Irišum. He will pay within 2 months. Month Narmak-Aššur-ša-kēnātim, eponymy after that of Amur-Aššur son of Karriya. If he has not paid he will add interest at the rate 3 shekels per month.

akk: KIŠIB ba-ba-zu-a DUMU šu-a-nim KIŠIB DU₁₀-ṣí-li-a-šur DUMU a-li-li KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU a-šùr-lá-ma-sí
eng: Seal of Babazua son of Šu-Anum, seal of Ṭāb-ṣill-Aššur son of Ali-ilī, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Aššur-lamassī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um du-ur-ḫu-mì-it i-dí-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Durhumit colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur KIŠIB ku-ra DUMU i-dí-a-šur KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí
eng: Seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur, seal of Kura son of Iddin-Aššur, seal of Aššur-lamassī<gap>

akk: <gap> 12.5 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša ku-da-tim ITU.KAM té-i-na-tim li-mu-um a-šur-ma-lik DUMU a-lá-ḫi-im DINGIR ša-pá-tám i-li-ik-ma i e-ra-bi₄-šu-ma i kà-né-eš ITU.2.KAM i-lá-ak-ma KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1 ma-na-im 1 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb ša-ni-um ṭup-pu-šu
eng: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owes 12.5 minas 5 shekels of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Kudātum, month Tē'inātum, eponymy Aššur-malik son of Ali-ahum, when the (moon-)god reached the fifteenth day, he will pay the silver 2 months after his arrival in Kanesh. If he has not paid in time, he must add interest at the rate of 1 shekel per mina per month. His second tablet:

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-mu-ta-bi₄-il₅ DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU PUZUR₄-ša-du-e KIŠIB lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur
eng: Seal of Ilī-muttabbil son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Lā-qēp son of Puzur-šadu'e, seal of Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur.

akk: 10 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er lá-qé-ep DUMU šu-a-šur DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša i-tur₄-DINGIR DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR ITU.KAM bé-el-té-kà-lim li-mu-um ša qá-tí šu-sú-in KÙ.BABBAR a-na 12 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i ma-lá u₄-me-šu KÙ.BABBAR lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa
eng: Lā-qēp son of Šu-Aššur owed 10 minas of refined silver to a merchant. Reckoned from the week of Itūr-ilī son of Amur-Ištar, month Bēlat-ekallim, eponymy after Šu-Suen, he must pay the silver within 12 weeks. If he has not paid the silver within his stipulated term, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony per mina per month.

akk: KIŠIB a-ba-ba
eng: Seal of Ababa;

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí KIŠIB in-ba-a-šur DUMU pì-lá-aḫ-sú-in KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur, son of Ištar-lamassī, seal of Inib-Aššur, son of Pilah-Suen, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā.

akk: 3 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU DINGIR-na-da DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša šu-ku-bi-im ú ka-zi-a 22.5 ŠE i-na ITU.KAM ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ma-ḫu-ur-DINGIR li-mu-um ša qá-té {d}IŠKUR-ba-ni
eng: 3 shekels of silver Puzur-Ištar, son of Ilī-nādā owes to the creditor. From the week of Šu-Kūbum and Kaziya he will add 1 / 8 shekel per month as interest. Month IV, eponymy of the successor of Adad-bāni.

akk: KIŠIB ì-lí-áš-ra-ni DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB šu-sú-in DUMU da-dí-im KIŠIB e-nu-bé-lúm
eng: Seal of Ilī-ašranni, son of Aššur-ṭāb, seal of Šu-Suen, son of Dadum, seal of Ennam-Bēlum,

akk: ša ší-tí ša ḫu-bu-ul ir-ma-a-šur i-na ITU.1.KAM bé-el-tí-É.GAL li-mu-um ša qá-té a-šur-na-da a-na <gap> nim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl 1.5 GÍN.TA 1 ma-na-um ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: of the remainder of the debt of Ir'am-Aššur. In month I, eponymy of the successor of Aššur-nādā, to / within <gap> he will pay, If he does not pay 1.5 shekels per mina, in accordance with the regulation of the colony he will add as interest per month.

akk: KIŠIB ḫa-nu-nu-DUB.SAR
eng: Seal of hanunu,

akk: li-ip-tí-IŠTAR DUMU lá-li-im ù ú-ṣur-ša-IŠTAR a-na a-la-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: scribe, of Lipit-Ištar son of Lālum and of Uṣur-ša-Ištar; to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-e-mu-qí KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU me-na-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Aššur-emūqi, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Menaya, seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: ša ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im 13 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša kàr-ri-a a-na 36 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb ša a-mur-IŠTAR ù a-šùr-i-mì-tí
eng: Concerning the debt of Iddin-abum of 13 minas of refined silver. Reckoned from the week of Karriya he must pay within 36 weeks. If he has not paid (in time), he must pay interest at the rate 1.5 shekel per month per mina. Concerning Amur-Ištar and Aššur-imittī.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-na-da DUMU ba-zi-a KIŠIB en-nam-a-šùr DUMU kà-ri-a KIŠIB ki-ta-a
eng: Seal of Ilī-nādā, son of Baziya, seal of Ennam-Ašsur, son of Kariya, seal of Kitaya,

akk: ša 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am ša e-lá-ma ki-ta-a i-bé-el iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ša-ma ú-da-pí-ir 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.1.KAM i-ma-nu-šu
eng: that Kitaya will manage 0.5 mina of silver belonging to Elamma. He is held by the silver. If he goes away to somewhere else, he will charge him 1 shekel per month.

akk: KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU šu-{d}NIN.ŠUBUR
eng: Seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Šu-Ilabrat.

akk: ṭup-pu-um ša ší-bu-tí-a ša IGI šu-ga-ri-a-e ša a-šur wa-bar-tum ša ša-mu-ḫa i-dí-ni-ma ší-bu-tí a-dí-in
eng: The tablet with my testimony before the šugarri'ā'u of Aššur. The station at Šamuha gave me and I gave my testimony.

akk: KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a DUMU e-dí-na-a KIŠIB i-ri-ší-im DUMU a-mur-{d}UTU KIŠIB {d}UTU.DU₁₀ DUMU am-ri-a
eng: Seal of Ikūn-pīya son of Eddinaya, seal of Irišum son of Amur-Šamaš, seal of Šamaš-ṭāb son of Amriya.

akk: <gap> ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er {d}UTU.DU₁₀ ḫu-dí-da tí-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša pu-šu-ke-en₆ ù PUZUR₄-a-šur a-na 3 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM ṣí-ip-im li-mu-um e-lá-lí KÙ.BABBAR ša DAM.GÀR-ri-im
eng: Šamaš-ṭāb owes <gap> minas of refined silver to hudida. Reckoned from the week of Pūšu-kēn and Puzur-Aššur he must pay within 3 weeks. If he has not paid, he must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month Ṣip'um, eponymy Elāli. The silver belongs to a merchant.

akk: KIŠIB pá-ru-ur-tim
eng: Seal of Parrurtum;

akk: a-na i-dí-a-bi-im DUMU na-ar-me-a
eng: to Iddin-abum son of Narmea.

akk: KIŠIB PUZUR₄-a-šur DUMU i-ku-pí-a KIŠIB dan-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU šu-up-ip-ra KIŠIB pè-ru-a DUMU a-ra-wa KIŠIB za-ba DUMU ḫa-nu KIŠIB lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi
eng: Seal of Puzur-Aššur, son of Ikūn-pīya, seal of Dān-Aššur, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Peruwa, son of Šuppibra, seal of Peruwa, son of Arawa, seal of Zaba, son of hanu, seal of Lullu, son of hapi,

akk: lu-lu DUMU ḫa-bi ša IŠTAR-lá-ma-sí DAM ku-ni-lim e-ḫu-zu iš-tù a-wi-il₅-tum me-ta-at-ni a-wa-tù-šu-nu i-gi₅-im-ra-ma lu gám-ra-am ša a-na a-wi-il₅-tim ig-mu-ru lu a-na ì-lí-a ša a-na ki-šar-ší-im i-ni-id-ú lu-lu gám-ra-am ig-mu-ru lu ša a-wi-il₅-tim lu a ša ì-lí-a a-na mì-ma šu-um-šu a-na me-er-e ḫa-ni-im lu-lu DUMU ḫa-be lá i-tù-ar
eng: <that is> Lullu, son of hapi, who had married Ištar-lamassī, wife of Kūn-ilum. After the lady had died, their affairs were were settled and for the expenses made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, who had been thrown into jail <and> whose expenses Lullu had paid, for both those made for the lady, and those made for Iliya, Lullu, son of hapi, will not raise any claims against the sons of hanum.

akk: a-na ša ki-ma i-a-tí ù bé-lá-nim
eng: To my representatives and Bēlānum;

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur
eng: seal of Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB kà-ri-im
eng: Seal of the

akk: kà-ni-iš kà-ru-um dí-nam i-dí-in-ma ša-lim-a-šùr ṭup-pí-šu ù mì-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-na ḫu-bu-ul i-dí-a-bi-im ú-ša-qí-lu ŠU.NÍGIN KÙ.BABBAR a-na me-er-e i-dí-a-bi-im i-qá-bé um-ma šu-ut-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-nàm a-ḫa-a ú-ša-qí-il₅
eng: Kanesh colony: The colony has passed a verdict stating that Šalim-Aššur shall mention to Iddin-abum's sons his tablets and what silver he has paid to cover Iddin-abum's debt - all the silver, saying: This silver I paid in different places." "

akk: KIŠIB {d}IŠKUR-pí-la-aḫ DUMU a-ni-nim KIŠIB a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-eb KIŠIB na-zi DUMU PUZUR₄-ba-ni-ni
eng: Seal of Adad-pilah, son of Anīnum, seal of Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, seal of Nazi, son of Puzur-banini.

akk: 3 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-šur-lá-ma-sí DUMU la-qé-ep e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša e-lá-ma ú zu-ba a-na 24 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na u₄-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim lá iš-qú-ul 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na 1 ma-na-im i-na ITU.KAM-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb ITU.KAM be-el-tí-É.GAL-lim li-mu-um ša qá-té šu-ḫu-bu-ur 8 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er šu-li DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu 1.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM-im a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ša qá-té ba-zi-a DUMU šé-ep-a-lim
eng: 3 minas of refined silver Aššur-lamassī, son of Lā-qēp, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 24 months from the week of Elamma and Zuba. If he does not pay when his term is up, he will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Month I, eponymy of the successor of Šu-hubur. 8 minas of refined silver Šuli, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will add as interest 1.5 shekel per mina per month. Eponymy of the successor of Baziya, son of Šēp-ālim.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ib-ni-lí KIŠIB a-šur-ma-lik DUMU PUZUR₄-a-šur KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ
eng: Seal of Ilī-bāni, son of Ibni-ilī, seal of Aššur-mālik, son of Puzur-Aššur, seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh!.

akk: 4 GÚ 32 ma-na URUDU ḫa-bu-ra-ta-am i-ṣé-er i-dí-a-šur DUMU PUZUR₄-a-be-eḫ e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša a-šur-re-ṣí a-na 14 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-t
eng: 4 talents 32 minas of copper from haburata Iddin-Aššur, son of Puzur-Abeh, owes to Elamma. He will pay within 14 weeks from the week of Aššur-rēṣī. If he does not pay he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB lá-qé-pì-im DUMU i-zi-za-am-DINGIR
eng: Seal of La-qēpum, son of Izzizam-ilī.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-na-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šùr <gap>
eng: For these words the Kanesh colony made me available and before Aššur's dagger I gave my testimony.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU šu-{d}EN.LÍL KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-ki-tim
eng: Seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Šu-Illil, seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šukkutum.

akk: KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR DUMU šu-a-a
eng: Seal of Šu-Ištar son of Šuaya.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dí-ni-ma IGI GÍR ša a-šur ší-bu-tí a-dí-in DINGIR-ba-ni DUMU ú-zu-a tap-pá-i
eng: The Kanesh colony gave me for these proceedings and I gave my testimony before Aššur's dagger. Ilī-bāni son of Uzuwa was my absent partner.

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi₄-im DUMU i-tur₄-DINGIR KIŠIB ú-nu-ba KIŠIB a-ší-a-at
eng: Seal of Iddin-abum son of Itūr-ilī, seal of Unuba, seal of Ašiat.

akk: 15 ma-na URUDU ma-sí-a-am i-ṣé-er ú-nu-ba ú a-ší-a-at wa-ar-dí ša dan-a-šur lu-zi i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni ú a-šur-na-da a-na 4 ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qú-lu i-na áb-na-tí-ni i-ša-qú-lu šu-ma lá iš-qú-lu ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣú-bu ITU.KAM ḫu-bu-ur li-mu-um i-dí-a-bu-um
eng: Unuba and Ašiat, Dan-Aššur's slaves, owe 15 minas of washed copper to Luzi. Reckoned from the week of Amurrum-bāni and Aššur-nādā they must pay within 4 weeks. They must pay using our weight stones. If they have not paid (in time) they must add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony. Month hubur eponymy Iddin-abum.

akk: a-na a-lá-ḫi-im ú a-šùr-ma-lik
eng: To Ali-ahum and Aššur-malik;

akk: KIŠIB i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: Seal of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB la-qé-pì-im DUMU a-šur-ma-lik KIŠIB dan-a-a DUMU a-ta-a KIŠIB im-dí-DINGIR DUMU šu-lá-ba-an
eng: Seal of Lā-qēpum, son of Aššur-mālik. seal of Dannaya, son of Ataya, seal of Imdī-ilum, son of Šu-Labān,

akk: ša 10 ma-na AN.NA ša i-ku-pì-IŠTAR a-na e-lá-ma i-di-nu 1.6666 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR im-dí-DINGIR il₅-qé šu-ma um-me-a-nu i-ku-pì-IŠTAR ú-la me-er-ú-šu a-na e-lá-ma i-tù-ru im-dí-DINGIR ú-ba-áb-šu
eng: that for the 10 minas of tin that Ikūn-pī-Ištar had given to Elamma Imdī-ilum received 1.6666 mina of silver. If the investors of Ikūn-pī-Ištar or his sons raise a claim against Elamma Imdī-ilum will clear him.

akk: KIŠIB {d}MAR.TU-ba-ni DUMU ma-na-na KIŠIB pu-šu-ke-en₆ DUMU sú-e-a
eng: Seal of Amurrum-bāni son of Manana, seal of Pūšu-kēn son of Sueyya.

akk: a-na a-wa-tim a-ni-a-tim kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš i-dì-ni-a-tí-ma IGI GÍR ša {d}a-šùr ší-bu-tí-ni ni-dí-in
eng: The Kanesh colony gave us for these proceedings and we gave our testimony before Aššur's dagger.

akk: KIŠIB šu-be-lim DUMU i-sú-rik₁₃
eng: Seal of Šu-Bēlum son of Issu-arik;

akk: a-na en-na-sú-in a-ḫi-šu ú a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU šál-ma-a-šur
eng: to his brother Enna-Suen and to Ali-ahum son of Šalim-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB ni-mar-IŠTAR DUMU ba-la KIŠIB a-bu-ša-lim DUMU ì-lí-a-lúm
eng: Seal of Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Nimar-Ištar, son of Bala, seal of Abu-šalim, son of Ilī-ālum.

akk: 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im DAM.GÀR-ru-um i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša {d}EN.LÍL-ba-ni ITU.KAM ṭí-i-na-tim 1 GÍN.TA i-na ITU.KAM a-na KÙ.BABBAR a-nim ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um
eng: 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, owes to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of Ellil-bāni, month X, he will add 1 shekel per month for this silver. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akk: KIŠIB IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB a-šùr-iš-ti-kál DUMU ḫi-na-a KIŠIB a-lá-ḫi-im DUMU sú-sà-a-a KIŠIB PÚZUR.IŠTAR DUMU šu-ku-bi₄-im KIŠIB be-lúm-ba-ni DUMU ga-zi-a KIŠIB áb-ša-lim
eng: Seal of Ištar-pālil, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Aššuriš-tikal, son of hinnāya, seal of Ali-ahum, son of Susāya, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Šu-Kūbum, seal of Bēlum-bāni, son of Gaziya, seal of Ab-šalim,

akk: DAM a-lá-ḫi-im 0.5 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ áb-ša-lim DAM a-lá-ḫi-im ù DUMU-e a-lá-ḫi-im DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša ḫa-na-a ITU.KAM kán-war-ta 0.5 GÍN.TA ṣí-ib-tám i-na ITU.KAM a-na 1 ma-na-im ú-ṣú-bu KÙ.BABBAR i qá-qá-ad šál-mì-šu-nu ú ke-ni-šu-nu ra-ki-is li-mu-um ḫa-na-na-ru-um i ša-ḫa-at áb-ša-lim ú me-er-e a-
eng: the wife of Ali-ahum. 0.5 mina of refined silver Ištar-pālil, Ab-šalim, the wife of Ali-ahum, and the sons of Ali-ahum owe to the creditor. From the week-eponymy of hanāya, month IX, they will add 1.5 shekel as interest per month per mina. The silver is bound on the one of them who is solvent and reliable. Eponymy of hanna-nārum.

akk: a-na en-nu-um-a-šur
eng: To Ennam-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB a-mur-IŠTAR
eng: seal of Amur-Ištar.

akk: 3 ma-na URUDU ú 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR a-<gap>
eng: 3 minas of copper and 2 shekels of silver <gap>

akk: a-na en-nam-a-šùr
eng: To Ennam-Aššur;

akk: KIŠIB IŠTAR-ra-bi₄-a-at
eng: seal of Ištar-rabi'at.

akk: KIŠIB DINGIR-tap-pá-a DUMU id-na-a KIŠIB a-ba-ta-na-nim DUMU a-šur-UTU-ši KIŠIB i-di-sú-in DUMU a-šùr-DU₁₀
eng: Seal of Ilī-tappā, son of Idnāya, seal of Abatanānum, son of Aššur-šamšī, seal of Iddin-Suen, son of Aššur-ṭāb.

akk: <gap> GÍN KÙ.BABBAR sa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er a-ba-ta-na-nim e-lá-ma i-šu ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-nu li-mu-um DINGIR-šu-GAL DUMU ba-zi-a a-na <gap> ḫa-am-ša-tim i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ú-ṣa-áb
eng: <gap> shekels of refined silver Abatanānum owes to Elamma. Month V, eponymy of Ilšu-rabi, son of Baziya. Within <gap> weeks he shall pay; if he does not pay he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the colony.

akk: KIŠIB ku-la a-ḫu-ú šu-ku-tim KIŠIB PUZUR₄-tí-a-am-tim DUMU IŠTAR-pá-li-il₅ KIŠIB en-um-a-šur DUMU kà-ri-a KIŠIB en-na-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im KIŠIB a-nu-li
eng: Seal of Kula brother of Šukkutum, seal of Puzur-Ti'amtum son of Ištar-pālil, seal of Ennam-Aššur son of Karria, seal of Enna-Suen son of Iddin-abum, seal of Anuli

akk: a-ḫi-šu lu-qú-tám ša ša-lim-a-šur ša i-na ḫa-ḫi-im É i-sú-ri-ik ù me-er-ú i-dí-a-bi-im iṣ-bu-tù-ni-ma a ma-lá ṭup-pí-im ša dí-in a-lim{ki} ša kà-ku-a ub-lá-ni a-na lu-qú-tim ší-a-tí en-na-sú-in ù a-nu-li a-na ša-lim-a-šur ú-lá i-tù-ru
eng: his brother. As to the goods belonging to Šalim-Aššur that were in hahhum in the house of Issu-arik, and which the sons of Iddin-abum seized - in accordance with the tablet with a verdict of the City that Kakuwa brought, Enna-Suen and Anuli must not raise claim against Šalim-Aššur with respect to these goods.

akk: a-na ni-ni ú i-lá-áb-ra-at-ba-ni
eng: To Nini and Ilabrat-bāni;

akk: KIŠIB ku-ni-lá
eng: seal of Kunila.

akk: a-pu-tum a-na a-wa-at ṭup-pì-im iḫ-da
eng: Urgent! Pay attention to the words of the letter.

akk: <gap> a-lim <gap> be-lá-nim <gap> KIŠIB a-ta-ta <gap> GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SAḪAR.BA i-ṣé-er DUMU a-šur-{d}UTU-ši DAM.GÀR i-šu iš-tù ITU.KAM ḫu-bur a-na ITU-<gap>-KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb wa-bi-il₅ ṭup-pí-im šu-ut DAM.GÀR li-mu-um a-šùr-mì-ti DUMU i-dí-IŠTAR
eng: <gap>-ālim <gap>Bēlānum <gap> seal of Atata <gap> shekels of 'dust silver' <gap>, son of Aššur-šamšī, owes to the creditor. From month VI he will pay in <gap> months. If he does not pay he will add interest in accordance with the rule of the . The bearer of the tablet is the creditor. Eponymy of Aššur-imittī, son of Iddin-Ištar.

akk: KIŠIB en-um-a-šùr DUMU a-ba-<gap> KIŠIB <gap> DUMU a-mur-IŠTAR KIŠIB a-bi-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a
eng: Seal of Ennum-Aššur, son of Aba<gap>, seal of <gap>, son of Amur-Ištar, seal of Abiaya son of Uzua.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR SAḪAR.BA be-ú-lá-at ku-li-ia DUMU a-lá-bi₄-im a-bi-a-a DUMU ú-zu-a ú-kà-al iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma a-e-ma ú-da-pì-ir-ma ag-ra-am ú-ga-ar-ma ig-re ag-ri-im ú-ma-lá <gap>
eng: 0.3333 mina 5 shekels of 'dust silver' the capital of Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, Abiaya, son of Uzua, has in possession, he is held by the silver. If he goes away to somewhere else, I will hire a hireling and he will compensate the wages of the hireling.

akk: KIŠIB a-šur-na-da DUMU a-mur-lu-sú KIŠIB i-di-{d}IŠKUR DUMU a-šur-DU₁₀ KIŠIB i-di-a-šur KIŠIB zu-ba KIŠIB a-ta-aḫ-šu
eng: Seal of Aššur-nādā, son of Āmur-ilūssu, seal of Iddin-Adad,

akk: ša 16 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR be-ú-lá-at a-ta-aḫ-šu-ú iš-ti KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al
KIŠIB a-ta-tí-a DUMU en-na-nim KIŠIB a-ḫu-wa-qar DUMU a-šur-SIPA KIŠIB a-mur-a-šur DUMU šu-eš-ḫa-ra KIŠIB a-šur-{d}UTU DUMU ili₅-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Atatiya, son of Ennānum, seal of Ahu-waqar, son of Aššur-rē'ī, seal of Amur-Aššur, son of Šu-Išhara, seal of Aššur-šamšī, son of Ilī-bāni.

akk: ša a-al-DU₁₀ a-mur-a-šur a-na iṣ-ba-at-ni-a-tí-ma um-ma a-al-DU₁₀-ma a-na a-mur-a-šur-ma KÙ.BABBAR a-ta ù šu-IŠTAR qá-tám mi-ìš-lá i-na ša i-ip-ṭí-re ša-qá-lá-am lá qá-bi-a-tù-nu um-ma a-mur-a-šur-ma ke-na qá-bi-a-ni ù i-na né-me-lim ša-li-ìš-tám áš-du-na-da i-zu-a-az ù a-na i-bi-sà-e šál-iš-tám i-za-az
eng: Āl-ṭāb seized us against Amur-Aššur and Āl-ṭāb said to Amur-Aššur: Have you and Šu-Ištar not promised (or: been ordered) to pay each half of the silver?" Amur-Aššur answered: "True, we have promised (or: been ordered) to pay each half of the silver and also (that) <gap> would receive as share one third of (so the envelope) the profit and that he (also) would be responsible for one third of the losses." In the presence of Atatiya, of Ahu-waqar, of Aššur-šamšī. Concerning Subārum / the Subaraean of the ransom."

akk: KIŠIB be-lá-nim DUMU šu-ku-bi-im KIŠIB a-gu₅-a DUMU dan-na-a-šur KIŠIB ú-ṣú-ur-ša-IŠTAR DUMU da-da-a
eng: Seal of Belanum, son of Su-Kubum, seal of Agua, son of Dan-Assur, seal of Usur-sa-Istar, son of Dadaya.

akk: 1 ma-na KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er bé-lá-nim DUMU šu-ku-bi-im ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi-im i-šu a-na ša-na-at ù 6 ITU.KAM KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma i-na ú-me-šu ma-al-ú-tim KÙ.BABBAR bé-lá-num lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im 1.5 GÍN.TA a-na ma-na-im ṣí-ib-tám a-na ur-ḫi-im ú-ṣa-áb ITU.1.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mu-um i-dí-sú-in DUMU i-dí-a-bi-im
eng: 1 mina of refined silver Belanum, son of Su-Kubum, owes to Kulia, son of Ali-abum. He will pay within one year and six months. If Belanum does not pay when his term is due in conformity with the rule of the karum he will add 1.5 shekel of interest per mina per month. Month V, eponymy of Iddin-Suen, son of Iddin-abum.

akk: KIŠIB i-ku-pí-a DUMU pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR KIŠIB ili₅-ba-ni DUMU mu-ta-lim KIŠIB a-šur-SIPA DUMU ú-ṣú-ra-nim
eng: Seal of Ikuppiya, son of Pilah-Istar, seal of Ili-bani, son of Mutalum, seal of Assur-re'i, son of Usuranum.

akk: 8 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er i-ku-pí-a DUMU pí-lá-aḫ-IŠTAR ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi-im i-šu-ú a-na 6 ur-ḫé KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qú-ul ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb <gap> 10 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR be-ú-lá-at ku-li-a DUMU a-lá-bi-im i-na-sú-in DUMU za-ar-ni-qí-im ú-ka-al iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma šu-ma a-e-ma ú-dá-pí-ir
eng: 8 shekels of refined silver Ikuppiya, son of Pilah-Istar, owes to Kuliya, son of Ali-abum. He will pay within 6 months. If he does not pay he will add interest in conformity with the rule of the karum. <gap> silver, a loan belonging to Kuliya, son of Ali-abum, Ennam-Suen, son of Zarniqum holds; he is held by the silver. If he goes away to somebody else, he will hire someone in his place and he will compensate the wages of the hireling. Seal of Ili-malik, son of Adad-ellat, seal of Iddin-Assur, son of Su-Belum, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Titinatal. 10 shekels of refined silver Ili-malik, son of Adad-ellat, owes to Kuliya, son of Ali-abum.

akk: KIŠIB e-la-lí DUMU i-ku-nim KIŠIB ša-lim-a-ḫi-im DUMU dan-a-šur KIŠIB en-na-sú-en₆ DUMU sú-kà-lí-a KIŠIB i-dí-a-šur DUMU a-šur-ma-lik
eng: Seal of Elalī, son of Ikūnum, seal of Šalim-ahum, son of Dān-Aššur, seal of Ennam-Suen, son of Sukkalliya, seal of Iddin-Aššur, son of Aššur-mālik,

akk: ša 1 ma-na 1.5 GÍN i-ṣé-er DINGIR-šu-GAL DUMU bu-la-lí e-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ITU.KAM áb-ša-ra-ni li-mì-im šu-ḫu-bur a-na ITU.3.KAM i-ša-qal šu-ma lá iš-qúl ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im ú-ṣa-áb KÙ.BABBAR iš-ri-iq-ma kà-ru-um kà-ni-iš a-na šu-šál-šum i-dí-šu
eng: that Ilšu-rabi, son of Bulāli, owes 1 mina 1.5 shekel of silver to Elamma. From month V?, eponymy of Šu-hubur? he will pay within 3 months. If he does not pay he will add (interest) in accordance with the rule of the colony. He had stolen silver and the colony had convicted him to (pay) the triple.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU a-ḫu-wa-qar KIŠIB šu-a-nim DUMU a-ki-a-nim KIŠIB a-šur-du-gul DUMU im-da-ḫi KIŠIB a-šur-DU₁₀ DUMU i-dí-ba-ni
eng: Seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Ahu-waqar, seal of Šu-Anim, son of Akiānum, seal of Aššur-dugul, son of Imdī-ahī, seal of Aššur-ṭāb, son of Idi-bāni,

akk: 12 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-šùr-DU₁₀ DUMU i-dí-ba-ni en-na-sú-in i-šu ITU.KAM na-ar-ma-ak-a-šur li-mu-um e-lá-li DUMU i-ku-nim ṣí-ib-tám ki-ma a-wa-at kà-ri-im kà-né-eš ú-ṣa-áb
eng: Ennam-Suen has a claim of 12 shekels of silver on Aššur-ṭāb, son of Idi-āni; month II / III, eponymy of Elalī, son of Ikūnum. He will add interest according to the regulation of of the Kanesh colony.

akk: KIŠIB šu-be-lim KIŠIB a-šur-i-dí
eng: Seal of Šu-Bēlum, seal of Aššur-idī,

akk: ša e-lá-ma šu-IŠTAR ba-áb ḫa-ra-ni-šu iṣ-bu-tù-ma um-ma e-lá-ma-ma 12.5 ma-na 7.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am i-na e-ra-bi₄-kà i-na wa-aḫ-šu-ša-na šé-bi₄-lam ù ša ší-ti AN.NA-ki-a i-na bu-ru-uš-ḫa-tim i-na e-ra-bi₄-kà-ma šé-bi₄-lam šu-ma lá tù-šé-bi₄-lam <gap> a-na URUDU SIG₅ <gap>-kà a-lá-qé um-ma šu-IŠTAR-ma li-qé
eng: (confirming) that Elamma seized Šu-Ištar when he was about to go on a journey and that Elamma said to him: 12 minas and 37.5 shekels of refined silver you must send me when you enter Wahšušana. And what (is due) for the remainder of my tin you must send me when you enter Burušhattum. If you fail to do so, <gap> for refined copper shall I take your <gap>?" Šu-Ištar answered: "Take it"."

akk: KIŠIB ku-ku-a-ma KIŠIB šu-IŠTAR
eng: Seal of Kukuwa and seal of Šu-Ištar;

akk: a-na en-um-a-šùr
eng: to Ennam-Aššur.

akk: KIŠIB a-šùr-ma-lik DUMU zu-a KIŠIB ga-sú
eng: Seal of Aššur-malik son of Zuwa; seal of Ga<gap>

akk: <gap> 7.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ṣé-er a-šu-a-an ú a-bu-na sú-ub-ri-kà i-šu i-nu-mì e-ṣí-du-ni ú 7.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR i-ša-qú-lu
eng: Ašuan and Abuna, your slaves, owe 7.5 shekels of silver.

akk: KIŠIB ḫu-lu-ba KIŠIB ša-ar-ni-ga-šu KIŠIB a-šur-mu-ta-pì-il₅ KIŠIB ili₅-TAB.BA DUMU id-na-a
eng: Seal of huluba, seal of Šarnigaššu,

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 2.5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR bé-ú-lá-at a-ta-aḫ-šu ḫa-pu-a-šu a-bu-šu il₅-qé iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al šu-ma a-na kà-ni-iš a-ša-pá-ra-šu ma-ma-an bé-el ḫu-bu-li-šu ša a-bi-šu lá i-ṭá-ḫi-šu-um
KIŠIB zi-qí-qí DUMU ì-lí-dan KIŠIB šál-ma-a-šur DUMU ú-zu-a KIŠIB PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU id-na-a
eng: Seal of Ziqiqi, son of Ilī-dān, seal of Šalim-Aššur, son of Uzua, seal of Puzur-Ištar, son of Idnāya.

akk: 0.3333 ma-na 5 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR ṣa-ru-pá-am bé-ú-lá-tim ša e-lá-ma PUZUR₄.IŠTAR DUMU id-na-a il₅-qé iš-tí KÙ.BABBAR uk-ta-al KÙ ú-ta-ar-ma ú i-ta-lá-ak šu-ma a-e-ma ú-dá-pì-ir e-ga-ar-ma ig-ri sà-ri-dim ú-ma-lá 2 GÍN KÙ.BABBAR lu-bu-šu il₅-qé
eng: 25 shekels of refined silver, a working capital belonging to Elamma, Puzur-Ištar, son of Idnāya, has received; with the silver he is held. When he returns the silver he can leave.
